metadata.description: AI Dev Garage — portable AI workflow runtime with standards, agile, dev-workflow, and Jira plugins

plugins.name: ai-garage-core
plugins.description: Pipeline standards (skill, agent, command, rule), self-management commands, and shared runtime rules.

plugins.name: ai-garage-agile
plugins.description: Agile backlog management — define and plan features, epics, stories; generate acceptance criteria and formatted definitions.

plugins.name: ai-garage-dev-workflow
plugins.description: Generic task delivery pipeline — analyze, plan, implement, finalize with WBS parallelism and project constitution management.

plugins.name: ai-garage-jira
plugins.description: Jira integration — fetch tickets, walk hierarchy, gap analysis; plugs into dev-workflow as a task source.
